expertise.title: Areas of
expertise.subtitle: Full-stack capabilities with deep specialization in AI, mobile, and modern web technologies.
expertise.aiDescription: Build intelligent systems that save time and reduce costs. Document processing, data analysis, workflow automation.
expertise.mobileDescription: Native-quality apps for iOS and Android. Cross-platform with React Native or native Swift/Kotlin.
expertise.fullstackDescription: End-to-end web applications. Modern React frontends, scalable Node.js backends, cloud infrastructure.
expertise.databaseDescription: Design and optimize database systems. SQL, NoSQL, caching strategies, performance tuning.
expertise.cloudDescription: Deploy and scale applications on AWS, GCP, or Azure. CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, infrastructure as code.
expertise.performanceDescription: Make applications blazingly fast. Code optimization, caching, CDN setup, lighthouse scoring.

inspiration.title: The Solo Path
inspiration.content: Solo developing isn't just a career choice; it's a commitment to efficiency, clarity, and holistic product building. By handling the full stack—from database architecture to user interface—I eliminate the communication gaps that plague large teams. This means faster iteration, cohesive design, and a product that truly reflects the vision. It's about taking full ownership and delivering excellence without the overhead.

profile.title: Who Am I?
profile.name: Fabien Chung
profile.bio: I am a passionate developer with over 20 years of experience in the tech industry. My journey has taken me through various roles and technologies, but my heart lies in building end-to-end solutions. I specialize in AI automation, mobile app development, and modern web applications. My goal is to help businesses scale by providing robust, scalable, and beautiful software solutions.
